languages.text: "Сам факт произнесения этих слов запятнает мою душу скверной, верю я или нет. Неважно что думает ксенос. Важно, что я изрек ересь".
"The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."
languages.original_text: "Сам факт произнесения этих слов запятнает мою душу скверной, верю я или нет. Неважно что думает ксенос. Важно, что я изрек ересь".

traits.locale_text: "The mere act of uttering these words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I have spoken heresy."
"The mere act of uttering these words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I have spoken heresy."

"The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

languages.text: "Allein solche Worte auszusprechen, würde meine Seele beflecken, egal, ob ich sie glaube oder nicht. Es spielt keine Rolle, was der Xenos denkt. Entscheidend ist, dass ich ketzerisch gesprochen hätte."
languages.original_text: "The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Allein solche Worte auszusprechen, würde meine Seele beflecken, egal, ob ich sie glaube oder nicht. Es spielt keine Rolle, was der Xenos denkt. Entscheidend ist, dass ich ketzerisch gesprochen hätte."

languages.text: « Le simple fait de prononcer ces mots souillera mon âme, que je les pense sincèrement ou non. Qu'importe ce qu'en pensera le xénos. Dans tous les cas, j'aurai cédé à l'hérésie. »
languages.original_text: "The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

traits.locale_text: « Le simple fait de prononcer ces mots souillera mon âme, que je les pense sincèrement ou non. Qu'importe ce qu'en pensera le xénos. Dans tous les cas, j'aurai cédé à l'hérésie. »

languages.text: «El mero hecho de pronunciar esas palabras mancillaría mi alma, independientemente de si las creo o no. No importa lo que piense el xenos, sino que por mi boca haya pasado la herejía».
languages.original_text: "The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

traits.locale_text: «El mero hecho de pronunciar esas palabras mancillaría mi alma, independientemente de si las creo o no. No importa lo que piense el xenos, sino que por mi boca haya pasado la herejía».

languages.text: "Böyle kelimeleri sarf ediyor olmanız, onlara inanıp inanmamamdan bağımsız olarak ruhumu lekeliyor. Zenonun ne düşündüğü önemli değil. Önemli olan benim kâfirlik etmiş olacak olmam."
languages.original_text: "The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

traits.locale_text: "Böyle kelimeleri sarf ediyor olmanız, onlara inanıp inanmamamdan bağımsız olarak ruhumu lekeliyor. Zenonun ne düşündüğü önemli değil. Önemli olan benim kâfirlik etmiş olacak olmam."

languages.text: “无论这些话是否出自真心实意，仅仅是吐出这些字眼，就足以玷污我的灵魂。异形怎么想无关紧要，重要的是，我亲口说出了异端之言。”
languages.original_text: "The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

traits.locale_text: “无论这些话是否出自真心实意，仅仅是吐出这些字眼，就足以玷污我的灵魂。异形怎么想无关紧要，重要的是，我亲口说出了异端之言。”

languages.text: 「そのような言葉を口にするという行為そのものが、私がそれを信じていようがいまいが、私の魂を汚れで穢すのです。異種族が何を考えるかは問題ではありません。重要なのは、私が異端を口にしてしまったという、その一点なのです」
languages.original_text: "The mere act of uttering such words will stain my soul with filth, whether I believe them or not. It does not matter what the xenos thinks. What matters is that I would have spoken heresy."

traits.locale_text: 「そのような言葉を口にするという行為そのものが、私がそれを信じていようがいまいが、私の魂を汚れで穢すのです。異種族が何を考えるかは問題ではありません。重要なのは、私が異端を口にしてしまったという、その一点なのです」
